description: CompositionBlack quilted sleeveless jacket made of polyester, has a mock neck, zippered front placket, insert pocket with concealed zipper opening on the upper left chest and zippered insert pockets on either sides of the front placketFittingComfortWash careDo not washDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringIron on lowDry cleanableThe zippered insert pockets and mock neck add smooth styling to this quilted sleeveless jacket from turtle, while the lining ensures that you stay insulated. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
